channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate Republicans Remove White House Ballroom Funding From Immigration Bill Amid Procedural Concerns
item.description: Senate Republicans have removed a controversial provision that would have funded security upgrades for President Donald Trump’s planned White House ballroom from a major immigration-related legislativ...

item.title: Senate Forms Committee to Engage Federal Government on Settlement of Contractors' Outstanding Payments
item.description: The Nigerian Senate on Tuesday take bold step by constituting a six-member committee to follow up with the Federal Ministry of Finance concerning the huge debts wey government dey owe local contractor...

item.title: DHS disputes allegations of hunger strike at New Jersey immigration detention center amid transparency concerns
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) became involved in a public dispute with celebrity chef and humanitarian José Andrés over conditions at the Delaney Hall immigration detention facility in New...

item.title: Republican Primary Upset in Iowa Raises Concerns for GOP Ahead of 2026 Elections
item.description: A report from MS NOW has sparked concern among Republican insiders after a Trump-endorsed candidate suffered an unexpected defeat in the Iowa GOP primary for governor. According to the report, Rep. Ra...

item.title: Andy Burnham’s Potential Return Highlights Labour’s Struggle to Rebuild a Post-Brexit Electoral Coalition
item.description: The article examines whether Andy Burnham could help Labour reconnect with voters it has lost in recent years, particularly in areas increasingly threatened by Reform UK. Burnham, the Mayor of Greater...

item.title: Neurorehabilitation and the potential for recovery after stroke and brain injury
item.description: The article explores the work of neurologist Orlando Swayne, co-lead of a neurorehabilitation unit in London, and his belief that meaningful recovery is possible for some patients after severe stroke ...

item.title: Allegations of ethical misconduct and political interference involving Nevada U.S. Attorney Sigal Chattah
item.description: A report based on multiple sources alleges that Sigal Chattah, the acting U.S. Attorney for Nevada appointed during the Trump administration, has repeatedly violated Justice Department ethics rules an...

item.title: Actor Hoon Lee Signs Representation Deal With Anonymous Content While Expanding Television and Film Projects
item.description: Actor Hoon Lee has signed with Anonymous Content for representation, according to an exclusive report from Variety. He will continue to be represented by Peikoff Mahan as part of his professional team...

item.title: Panasonic’s Kinari: A Plant-Based Plastic Alternative Made from Waste Materials
item.description: Kinari is an innovative material developed by Panasonic’s MI Division as a potential alternative to conventional plastics. Under development since 2015, it is made almost entirely from plant-based fib...

item.title: TNBC Approves Plan for International Financial Centre in Dar es Salaam to Strengthen Investment and Capital Access
item.description: Tanzania has taken a significant step towards establishing an International Financial Centre (IFC) in Dar es Salaam following a decision reached during the 38th Executive Committee meeting of the Tanz...

item.title: Tanzania Forward Dismas Shida Athanasi Named Top Scorer with Three Goals at CAF U-17 Tournament in Morocco
item.description: Tanzania has big reason to celebrate after young footballer Dismas Shida Athanasi won the Golden Boot at the TotalEnergies CAF Under-17 Africa Cup of Nations held in Morocco in 2026. The 14-year-old f...

item.description: Former Vice President Mike Pence appeared on CNN’s “News Central” to promote his new book, “What Conservatives Believe: Rediscovering the Conservative Conscience,” where he discussed and defended aspe...

item.title: DOJ official deletes social media post after comments on Jan. 6 compensation fund spark scrutiny
item.description: A senior Justice Department official briefly sparked controversy after posting and then deleting a message on X that appeared to suggest continued attention to a disputed compensation mechanism tied t...

item.title: Rare 1974 Promotional Photos of Suzi Quatro in Leather Bikini from Adelaide Tour
item.description: The article highlights a set of vintage promotional photographs of American rock singer, bassist, and actress Suzi Quatro taken in 1974 during her tour in Adelaide, Australia. While Quatro is widely r...

item.title: Opinion piece criticizes leadership changes at CBS News and alleged impact on 60 Minutes under Bari Weiss
item.description: The article is an opinion commentary reflecting on the perceived decline of traditional broadcast journalism, particularly CBS News and its flagship program 60 Minutes. The author begins with a nostal...

item.title: Counties Grapple with Rising Solid Waste Management Challenges Amid Population Growth
item.description: Counties across Kenya are facing a growing crisis in solid waste management, a challenge that is expected to worsen in the coming years due to rapid population growth and the expansion of industrial a...

item.title: Rising Anti-Immigrant Tensions in South Africa Linked to Economic Challenges and Political Responses
item.description: A report by The Africa Report examines the rise of xenophobic sentiment and violence in South Africa as the country approaches local elections scheduled for November 2026. South Africa remains one of ...

item.title: Paul Krugman criticizes Trump’s leadership and political direction amid controversy over intelligence nomination
item.description: In an opinion piece cited by journalist Matthew Chapman, Nobel Prize-winning economist Paul Krugman offers a sharply critical assessment of President Donald Trump’s current leadership and political tr...

item.title: Concerns raised over appointment of acting intelligence chief and potential politicization of election oversight ahead of midterms
item.description: Donald Trump’s decision to appoint Bill Pulte as acting Director of National Intelligence has sparked concerns among legal experts and lawmakers about the potential politicization of U.S. intelligence...

item.title: Trump Confirms Using Profanity During Call With Netanyahu Over Israel-Lebanon Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump acknowledged in an interview published on June 3, 2026, that he used profanity during a phone conversation with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. The discussion reporte...
